name: card
description: Versatile surface container with elevated, filled, and outlined variants. Supports structured content slots: media, title, subtitle, body (with show-more truncation), children, and footer.

props.name: variant
props.description: Visual style variant of the card surface

props.name: surface
props.description: Background surface color token to use

props.name: shadow
props.description: Elevation shadow level; only applies to the elevated variant

props.name: padding
props.description: Inner padding applied to the content area

props.name: onPress
props.description: If provided, the card becomes pressable with a Pressable wrapper

props.name: disabled
props.description: Disables press interaction and applies disabled opacity

props.name: media
props.description: Content rendered above the padding area, typically an image

props.name: title
props.description: Primary heading text rendered in the content area

props.name: subtitle
props.description: Secondary heading text rendered below the title

props.name: body
props.description: Body text with automatic show-more truncation when it exceeds textThreshold

props.name: textThreshold
props.description: Character count at which body text is truncated with a show-more toggle

props.name: children
props.description: Arbitrary content rendered inside the card content area

props.name: footer
props.description: Content rendered at the bottom of the card with a separator line

props.name: header
props.description: Deprecated. Use title + subtitle or children instead
